summary: Classified the five inventory PRs conservatively using the hydrated preflight artifact. No GitHub mutations are planned because instant close, low-signal closeout, merge, fix, and raise_pr are disabled for this job; the open PRs remain owned by their individual maintainer/review paths.

actions.reason: Focused bug-fix PR with failing proof gate and no allowed fix/merge path in this job.
Maintainer-owned draft with active author ownership and unresolved review signal; keep open as an independent PR.
Independent focused memory-core PR with green checks but remaining proof/technical review requirements outside this inventory job.
Broad independent feature PR with failing relevant checks and unresolved bot review findings; keep open for normal maintainer/author follow-up.
Related maintainer-owned draft in an agent tool-descriptor hardening family; keep open without inventing a canonical.
